caption: A woman with brown hair, wearing a blue blazer over a light blue button-down shirt, looks toward the left with a concerned expression. The scene shifts to a wide shot of the Statue of Liberty surrounded by a vast sea of floating US dollar bills that drift through the air around her. The view then changes to a tropical beach setting with white sand and blue ocean waves. A stylized, orange-skinned character with a black torso stands on the beach. The character's torso features white text that reads "Business Owners" above the word "ROEk". This figure remains stationary on the shoreline as the scene persists, with a line of palm trees and a distant coastline visible in the background.
